---
name: Skill contribution
about: Propose a new skill or major update to an existing skill in the QML library
title: "[Skill] "
labels: skill
assignees: ""
---

## Skill name

Proposed skill name (lowercase, hyphen-separated):

## Problem it solves

What user problem does this skill address?

## Where it fits

- [ ] foundations
- [ ] routing
- [ ] modeling
- [ ] interface
- [ ] training
- [ ] performance
- [ ] backends
- [ ] interop
- [ ] benchmarking

## Dependencies / handoffs

- Depends on:
- Hands off to:

## Proposed files

- [ ] `SKILL.md`
- [ ] `prompts/quickstart.md`
- [ ] `examples/workflows.md`
- [ ] templates or starter code

## Draft summary

Provide a short description of the skill and how it should be used.

## Notes

Remember that `skills/qml/` is the source-of-truth and exports should be generated, not edited by hand.
